title: Simple SetHome
description: Simple /sethome mod. Perfect for SMP servers
body:
Simple SetHome


🌟 My First Ever Mod! ;D
(So there will be only 1 version here, if anyone wants it, I will upload other versions)
Took me 3 hours to create
Enjoy <3


A lightweight, elegant, and reliable home system for Minecraft!
Key features:

Create as many homes as you want with /sethome <name>
Teleport with a beautiful 5 second countdown timer and personalized bossbar
Extremely smooth progress animation (updates every 50 ms)
Teleportation cancels on any damage or movement
Easy removal with /delhome <name>
Tab completion for home names
Portal particles & sounds on start/finish
Configurable home limit (default: 3)

Perfect for smp servers and any place where you want a clean & simple home system.
Requires: Forge 1.20.1

You can use it in your modpacks, study the code, but the main thing is not to pass it off as your mod

My discord: commandik
